Ormond Beach Restaurant Health Grades

81%Grade A
4.4Avg rating
27Restaurants

Ormond Beach grades cleaner than most of Central Florida: 81% of the 27 restaurants we track here hold an A. GRIND GASTROPUB & TIKI BAR leads the list at 100/100. Below, every kitchen is sorted best grade first, so the safest bets rise to the top.

Ormond Beach restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Ormond Beach restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 27 Ormond Beach restaurants we grade, 22 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Ormond Beach restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Ormond Beach?

We currently publish 27 graded restaurants in Ormond Beach, with an average diner rating of 4.4 stars; 22 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
